title: Mods of Mayhem
description: Not really! Just a great Mounts of Mayhem modpack!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/taDrqaBa/images/b674f442bd6344e361bd4c83acecbcc4b6056b3b.png)

# Bringing the best out of Minecraft's Mounts of Mayhem update! I love the polish and exploration of mods, but wanted the new update experience, so I made this! Nothing crazy, just a high quality mod selection that feels familiar.

## Fun Features
### - Full controller support from Controllify
### - High performance and stunning visuals from ReShaded
### - Beautiful terrain from CliffTree
### - New nether biomes from Cinderscapes
### - End update from Enderscape
### - Structures from Dungeons and Taverns
### - Improved combat from ReArm
### - Steampunk tech from Create
### - Homesteading with Farmer's Delight
### - Many quality of life mods


## Quick Start Guide:
### 1. Download through Modrinth Launcher. 
### 2. Allocate 4-12 GB Ram. I recommend 8, depending on your specs. 
### 3. Press Play!
### 4. Start your adventure! The advancement screen is really helpful!


### Please report bugs in the discord server!
### https://discord.gg/g9TmNpQ8Xx


### If you're looking for another amazing, extremely unique, and very vanilla friendly modpack, try out Legacies here: https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacies







Several projects included in past versions of this modpack are only available on Curseforge. As such, these attribution links go back to their original pages. Show them some love for all their work!
